queries.question: What facilities do we have for every condominium?
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.facilityName  from Condominium_Complexes_Facilities join Facilities on Condominium_Complexes_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Condominium_Complexes on Condominium_Complexes_Facilities.condoId = Condominium_Complexes.id   GROUP BY Condominium_Complexes_Facilities.facilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Condominium_Complexes_Facilities.condoId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Condominium_Complexes)

queries.question: What facilities do we have for every condominium?
queries.sql: select condominium_complexes.name , facilities.facilityname from Condominium_Complexes_Facilities join Facilities on Condominium_Complexes_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Condominium_Complexes on Condominium_Complexes_Facilities.condoId = Condominium_Complexes.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?facilityname WHERE {
  ?condominium_complexes_facilities a :Condominium_Complexes_Facilities .
  ?facilities a :Facilities .
  ?condominium_complexes_facilities p:hasFacilities ?facilities .
  ?condominium_complexes a :Condominium_Complexes .
  ?condominium_complexes_facilities p:hasCondominium_Complexes ?condominium_complexes .
  ?condominium_complexes p:name ?name .
  ?facilities p:facilityName ?facilityname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What facilities do we have for every condominium?
